title: Kernel bootstrap lane subagent8. Narrow read-only task: inspect only the files most likely to govern slash command recognition in this repo: CODEX.md, scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh, scripts/local/launchers/kernel, and tests/test-codex-kernel-prompt.sh. Do not edit. Return the single most...
summary_text: Most likely root cause: the shell adapter only reaches slash prompt dispatch through the last fallback in the kernel launcher, so if that fallback dependency is missing/broken, `/kernel` appears unusable even when earlier attempts are skipped. ` /kernel` path is effectively broken at: - [`scripts/local/launchers/kernel:64`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/kernel#L64) `exec "${launcher_dir}/codex-prompt-launch" kernel "$@"` is the single smallest failure point in the inspected path; if `codex-prompt-launch` in that resolved launcher directory is not present/resolved correctly, slash command startup cannot happen.
